description_long: This is a large, two-tiered wrought iron chandelier suspended from a ceiling mount by four sturdy rods. The fixture features a circular design with two concentric rings, each supporting a series of candle-like holders arranged symmetrically around the perimeter. Each holder is topped with a white, cylindrical candle, giving the piece a medieval or gothic appearance. The ironwork is dark, with a weathered, slightly rusted finish, and the structure is robust, with visible rivets and angular supports. The central hub and connecting rods are solid and geometric, adding to the industrial aesthetic. The overall look is imposing and decorative, suitable for grand urban interiors or historic public spaces.
description: A large, two-tiered wrought iron chandelier with candle-style holders and a weathered, gothic appearance. Features concentric rings, sturdy supports, and a dark, rustic finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full circular arrangement of candle holders and the robust iron supports.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the symmetry of the candle placement and the depth of the two-tiered rings.
description_view_2: Rear angled view emphasizing the geometric structure of the supports and the even spacing of the candles.
description_view_3: Side view displaying the thickness of the iron rings and the vertical alignment of the candle holders.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, gothic, and industrial design, characterized by dark wrought iron, angular supports, and a medieval candle arrangement. The weathered finish and robust construction evoke historic and rustic influences.
